expectations.text: Report follows boost template (P-XXX IDs, Executive Summary, Source section)
expectations.evidence: Report has '# simon-bot Boost Report', Source section with link/date, Executive Summary, and P-001 through P-011 proposal IDs
Correctly identifies Anthropic's 5 agent patterns (prompt chaining, routing, parallelization, orchestrator-workers, evaluator-optimizer) and key principles (simplicity first, ACI, transparency)

expectations.text: Proposals reference specific skills and file paths
expectations.evidence: Every proposal specifies target skills and files, e.g. P-001: 'simon-bot, simon-bot-grind' + 'SKILL.md, references/phase-b-implementation.md'

expectations.text: Proposals are actionable with concrete changes
expectations.evidence: P-001 describes Quick Triage scan mechanism, P-002 proposes structured scoring (completeness/feasibility/safety/clarity 1-5), P-007 has specific poka-yoke examples
All 5 experts present: Workflow Architect, Prompt Engineer, Innovation Scout, Quality & Safety Guardian, DX Specialist — each with independent analysis + cross-discussion

expectations.text: Includes Not Recommended section with rejected ideas
expectations.evidence: 5 rejected ideas: pipeline collapse, Agent Teams removal, full voting adoption, full autonomy, retry reduction — each with reasoning
